 {"id":"bd-ikfq","title":"Unit Tests: bubbletea simulator","description":"Comprehensive tests for the bubbletea test simulator.

## Current State
Simulator has tests but needs expansion for:
- Batch/sequence command execution
- Timer and tick simulation
- Window resize handling
- Error propagation

## Test Requirements

### Simulator Core
- [ ] sim_init() with various Model implementations
- [ ] sim_update() message routing
- [ ] sim_view() output capture
- [ ] Multiple update cycles

### Event Simulation
- [ ] sim_key() for all key types
- [ ] sim_mouse() for all mouse events
- [ ] sim_paste() for clipboard
- [ ] sim_resize() dimension handling

### Command Execution
- [ ] Batch commands execute all
- [ ] Sequence commands maintain order
- [ ] Nested batch/sequence combinations
- [ ] Command result message routing

### Edge Cases
- [ ] Empty batch handling
- [ ] Recursive updates (message spawns message)
- [ ] Large message queues
- [ ] Concurrent timer expirations

## Success Criteria
- Simulator can test any Model without real terminal
- All command types work correctly
- Timing-sensitive tests are deterministic","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-28T18:51:35.290507703Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T20:38:44.380704888Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T20:38:42.845133735Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["bubbletea","simulator","testing","unit"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ikfq","depends_on_id":"bd-28co","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:05Z","created_by":"import"}],"comments":[{"id":23,"issue_id":"bd-ikfq","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"COMPLETED by VioletDog (2026-01-28)

## Summary
Added comprehensive tests and helper methods to the bubbletea simulator.

## New Helper Methods (5)
- `sim_key(c: char)` - Simulate single character key press
- `sim_key_type(key_type: KeyType)` - Simulate special keys (Enter, Esc, arrows)
- `sim_mouse(x, y, button, action)` - Simulate mouse events
- `sim_resize(width, height)` - Simulate window resize
- `sim_paste(text)` - Simulate bracketed paste

## New Tests (12)
### Event Simulation
- test_sim_key_sends_char
- test_sim_key_type_sends_special_keys
- test_sim_mouse_sends_clicks
- test_sim_resize_sends_dimensions
- test_sim_paste_sends_text

### Sequence Commands
- test_simulator_sequence_command

### Edge Cases
- test_empty_batch_does_not_panic
- test_recursive_updates_bounded
- test_large_message_queue
- test_model_mut_allows_direct_modification
- test_step_without_messages_returns_none
- test_views_accumulate

## Test Results
**22/22 simulator tests pass**","created_at":"2026-01-28T20:38:44Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-iwbw","title":"Dashboard: animated counters/progress (harmonica)","description":"Make the Dashboard feel alive with tasteful, physics-based motion (harmonica).

Why:
- Smooth motion is a signature Charm aesthetic.
- Animated counters and progress bars make metrics changes readable and satisfying.

What to animate:
- Counter values (requests/sec, latency, error rate):
  - spring toward target to avoid jitter
- Progress bars:
  - ease changes rather than snapping
- Optional:
  - a subtle transition when switching focus between dashboard cards

Constraints:
- Must not interfere with input responsiveness.
- Must respect reduce-motion / `--no-animations`:
  - values snap directly to targets

Acceptance:
- Motion is smooth, stable, and never causes flicker.
- The dashboard remains readable even with rapid metric changes.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:09:59.093043228Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T03:56:24.359362381Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T03:56:24.359295086Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["dashboard","demo_showcase","harmonica"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iwbw","depends_on_id":"bd-2myg","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:05Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-iwbw","depends_on_id":"bd-3q7p","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:05Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-iwbw","depends_on_id":"bd-dkff","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:05Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-k52c","title":"demo_showcase theme: live theme switching UI","description":"Implement runtime theme switching.

Requirements:
- A theme picker (modal or Settings page) showing available presets.
- Instant visual update across the whole app (ThemeContext listeners).
- Store selected theme in app state; optional: persist to a small config file.

Acceptance:
- Switching themes never leaves mismatched colors or broken layouts.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:08:24.347383831Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T03:33:45.673663216Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T03:33:45.673593426Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","lipgloss","theme"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-k52c","depends_on_id":"bd-39zu","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:05Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-k52c","depends_on_id":"bd-3mh2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:05Z","created_by":"import"}]}
-{"id":"bd-kjhd","title":"Update docs: mouse drag is supported (terminal-dependent), add unit test for crossterm Drag mapping","description":"Conformance includes mouse motion/drag parsing fixtures and bubbletea maps crossterm MouseEventKind::Drag -> MouseAction::Motion. README/FEATURE_PARITY still claim mouse drag is "limited".

Do:
- Add a focused unit test in `crates/bubbletea/src/mouse.rs` verifying `from_crossterm_mouse` maps Drag(Left) to `{action: Motion, button: Left}` (and maybe Moved -> Motion/None).
- Update `README.md` Limitations row for Mouse drag to reflect it is supported but terminal-dependent and requires enabling mouse motion.
- Update `FEATURE_PARITY.md` Other Limitations bullets accordingly (and keep Unicode note if still relevant).","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-10T16:04:39.787227748Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-10T16:04:55.124189569Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["bubbletea","docs","mouse"]}

README/FEATURE_PARITY still claim mouse drag is "limited".

Do:

- Update `README.md` Limitations row for Mouse drag to reflect it is supported but terminal-dependent and requires enabling mouse motion.
- Update `FEATURE_PARITY.md` Other Limitations bullets accordingly (and keep Unicode note if still relevant).","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-10T16:04:39.787227748Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-10T16:07:54.029084385Z","closed_at":"2026-02-10T16:07:54.029019836Z","close_reason":"Added crossterm Drag/Moved mapping tests and updated README/FEATURE_PARITY mouse drag status; fmt/check/clippy green","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["bubbletea","docs","mouse"]}
 {"id":"bd-l26a","title":"Dashboard: implement layout (cards, grids, status)","description":"Implement the dashboard screen layout.

Content ideas:
- Top row: overall platform status, current env, uptime, active incidents.
- Middle: service health cards + deployment status.
- Bottom: small table (recent deploys/jobs) + sparkline-like text charts.

Acceptance:
- Looks great at 80x24 and scales up gracefully.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:09:56.862373395Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T01:20:28.911225625Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T01:20:28.911161195Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["dashboard","demo_showcase","lipgloss"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-l26a","depends_on_id":"bd-2k35","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:05Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-l26a","depends_on_id":"bd-3bz7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:05Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-l26a","depends_on_id":"bd-7jxu","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:05Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-l26a","depends_on_id":"bd-dkff","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:05Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-lxky","title":"Unit tests: animation subsystem determinism + reduce-motion","description":"Add deterministic unit tests for the demo_showcase animation subsystem.

Why:
- The showcase will lean heavily on motion; we need confidence it won’t become flaky or timing-dependent.
- CI must be able to validate animation code paths without real sleeps.

Test coverage:
- Given a fixed dt (e.g., 16ms) and fixed initial/target values, stepping the animation yields deterministic values.
- Animations stay bounded (no NaNs, no runaway values, no panics on extreme dt).
- Reduce-motion / `--no-animations` behavior:
  - animated values immediately snap to target (or the subsystem becomes a no-op) according to the design.
  - no tick scheduling when animations are disabled.

Acceptance:
- Tests do not depend on wall-clock time.
- Failures clearly report which animation invariant broke.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:58:35.665155320Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T22:21:52.514623411Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T22:21:52.514494150Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["anim","demo_showcase","test"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-lxky","depends_on_id":"bd-2q95","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:05Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-lxky","depends_on_id":"bd-2zeq","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:05Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-lxky","depends_on_id":"bd-3q7p","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:05Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-miqo","title":"E2E scenario: docs render + search + resize reflow","description":"Scenario: docs page rendering quality.

Steps:
- Open Docs
- Switch between two docs
- Search for a term
- Simulate resize (send WindowSizeMsg) and verify reflow occurs

Assertions:
- Rendered output changes with width.
- Search navigation finds matches.

Acceptance:
- Catches regressions in glamour integration and responsive layout.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:32:39.583157581Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-29T00:15:35.847324443Z","closed_at":"2026-01-29T00:15:35.847193920Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","e2e","test"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-miqo","depends_on_id":"bd-2lkz","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:05Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-miqo","depends_on_id":"bd-35d2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:05Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-miqo","depends_on_id":"bd-39bb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:05Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-miqo","depends_on_id":"bd-pfqw","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:05Z","created_by":"import"}]}
